assessment.note: He names an approval-path gap before pushing, which is a mild negative clarity signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'who should approve what before I push' not drilled because drill cap requires advancing the arc.

new_queue.label: Ticket expectations
new_queue.name: What feels clear or unclear about what “done enough to ship” means here?
new_queue.description: Checks whether his hesitation is coming from expectations rather than ability.

new_queue.label: Handoff map
new_queue.name: Where are the onboarding handoffs still fuzzy for you?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific boundary points where he is still compensating.

new_queue.label: Confidence trigger
new_queue.name: What tends to make you pause before shipping a ticket?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the concrete trigger behind late reassurance-seeking.

new_queue.label: Waiting on piece
new_queue.name: What are you usually waiting on when work starts to feel stuck?
new_queue.description: Identifies the missing decision, artifact, or input that slows him down.

new_queue.label: Support cadence
new_queue.name: What kind of check-in from me would be most useful over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Helps line up a lightweight support rhythm without over-managing.

new_queue.label: Two-week takeaway
new_queue.name: What’s the one thing you want to have changed by our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete commitment for the next two weeks.
